name: Kimi Code CLI
description: Moonshot Kimi Code CLI — K2.7 Code model. Governed forge worker under arifOS F1-F13. A-FORGE is the sole engineering actuator via stdio (77 tools). AMANAH + MARUAH explicit in system identity.
mcpStrategy: A-FORGE stdio is the stable engineering ingress. Legacy direct MCPs disabled; all MUTATE/SEARCH/BROWSER/GITHUB route through A-FORGE forge_* tools with kernel leases.
auditNote: Aligned 2026-06-20: A-FORGE moved to stdio due to HTTP single-session SDK limitation; amanah/maruah principles embedded in config + system prompt; legacy direct MCPs disabled.
